mapper.select: SELECT id, name, slug, created_at, updated_at FROM tags ORDER BY name ASC
SELECT id, name, slug, created_at, updated_at FROM tags WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, name, slug, created_at, updated_at FROM tags WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM tags t INNER JOIN post_tags pt ON pt.tag_id = t.id WHERE pt.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY t.name ASC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tags WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tags WHERE slug = #{slug}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM tags WHERE slug = #{slug} AND id != #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tags (name, slug, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{slug}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.update: UPDATE tags SET name = #{name}, slug = #{slug}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
